homeAppliances.title: Home Appliances
homeAppliances.overview: We supply flame-retardant, impact-modified, and high-gloss compounds for major appliance manufacturers — from structural housings to aesthetic exterior panels.
homeAppliances.ctaText: Need custom materials for your appliances?

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.overview: We supply high-performance compounds for automotive interiors, under-hood applications, and structural components — meeting stringent requirements for heat resistance, dimensional stability, and impact strength.
automotive.ctaText: Need custom materials for automotive components?

construction.title: Construction
construction.overview: We provide weather-resistant, UV-stabilized, and flame-retardant plastics for construction applications — from piping systems to building profiles and electrical components.
construction.ctaText: Need custom materials for construction applications?

consumerElectronics.title: Consumer Electronics
consumerElectronics.overview: We deliver precision-molded, flame-retardant, and high-gloss compounds for consumer electronics — meeting strict aesthetic, dimensional, and safety requirements.

industrialParts.title: Industrial Parts
industrialParts.overview: We supply high-performance compounds for industrial applications demanding mechanical strength, wear resistance, chemical resistance, and long-term durability.
industrialParts.ctaText: Need custom materials for industrial components?

airConditioner.title: Air Conditioner
airConditioner.description1: We supply high-performance modified plastics for air conditioner manufacturers, meeting strict requirements for flame retardancy, impact resistance, heat deflection, and dimensional stability.
airConditioner.description2: Our compounds are used in critical structural components, airflow systems, and housings — providing reliable performance under continuous operation and temperature cycling.
airConditioner.description3: From indoor units to outdoor enclosures, we deliver materials that meet UL, IEC, and industry-specific certifications.
airConditioner.a1Desc: AS + Reinforced / High rigidity / Dimensional stability / Heat resistant / Low warpage
airConditioner.a2Desc: PP + Weather resistant / Flame retardant / Anti-aging
airConditioner.a3Desc: PP + Reinforced / High temperature / High rigidity
airConditioner.a4Desc: PA6 + Flame retardant / High temperature / Electrical insulation
airConditioner.a5Desc: PC + Heat resistant / High rigidity / Impact modified
airConditioner.ctaTitle: Need materials for air conditioner components?
airConditioner.ctaText: We provide custom formulations tailored to your exact specifications and testing requirements.

ledLighting.title: LED Lighting
ledLighting.description: We supply high-performance modified plastics for the LED lighting industry, meeting strict requirements for flame retardancy, heat resistance, electrical insulation and weather resistance. Our materials are widely used in LED fixture bases, housings, structural components and heat dissipation parts.
ledLighting.b1Desc: PP + Flame retardant V0 / Heat resistant / Electrical insulation
ledLighting.b2Desc: PA6 + Flame retardant / High temperature / Electrical insulation
ledLighting.b3Desc: ABS + Flame retardant / Electrical insulation / Heat resistant
ledLighting.b4Desc: PA6 + Flame retardant / Weather resistant / High temperature / Electrical insulation
ledLighting.ctaTitle: Need materials for LED lighting components?
ledLighting.ctaText: We provide custom formulations tailored to your exact specifications and testing requirements.

bearingBushings.title: Bearing Bushings
bearingBushings.description: We provide high wear-resistance, high-strength modified plastics for rotational load-bearing components, widely used in bearings, bushings and roller assemblies for medical equipment, industrial machinery and more.
bearingBushings.c2Desc: PA6 + Reinforced / High strength / Wear resistant
bearingBushings.ctaTitle: Need materials for bearing and bushing components?
bearingBushings.ctaText: We provide custom formulations tailored to your exact specifications and testing requirements.

pumpValveBodies.title: Pump & Valve Bodies
pumpValveBodies.description: We provide weather-resistant and chemically resistant modified plastics for fluid equipment and water treatment industries, used in pump bodies, valves, and housings and structural parts for outdoor water treatment equipment.
pumpValveBodies.c1Desc: ASA + Weather resistant / Anti-aging / Dimensional stability / Hydrolysis resistant
pumpValveBodies.c3Desc: ASA + Weather resistant / Anti-aging / UV resistant
pumpValveBodies.ctaTitle: Need materials for pump and valve components?
pumpValveBodies.ctaText: We provide custom formulations tailored to your exact specifications and testing requirements.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.label: ABOUT US
about.paragraph1: Founded in 1989, Shengxin Plastic is a professional manufacturer of modified plastic compounds based in Ningbo, China. With over 37 years of expertise, we have earned a reputation for delivering engineering-grade thermoplastic solutions to customers worldwide.
about.paragraph2: Our modern facility is equipped with advanced twin-screw extrusion lines, an in-house QC laboratory, and dedicated R&D capabilities. We produce 20,000+ tons annually, serving industries including home appliances, automotive, construction, consumer electronics, and industrial manufacturing.
about.certifications: CERTIFICATIONS: ISO 9001 · SGS · ROHS · REACH · UL
about.excellenceText: We combine decades of formulation expertise with modern manufacturing technology. Every batch undergoes rigorous testing — from raw material inspection to final product certification.
